reasoning: Among all plans, only 'plan_fem_imex_mediumres' provides both residual_l2 and relative_residual metrics. It achieves a much lower relative_residual (0.00224) and residual_l2 (0.00084) than any other plan, with a runtime (44.34s) that is also the fastest. Therefore, 'plan_fem_imex_mediumres' is the clear best choice, balancing both accuracy and efficiency.
